pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { address owner; function setOwner(address n) external { owner=n; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { address owner; function setOwner(address n) external { require(msg.sender==owner,"!auth"); owner=n; } }

pragma solidity ^0.4.24;
contract C { mapping(address=>uint) bal; function add(uint a) public { bal[msg.sender]+=a; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { mapping(address=>uint) bal; function add(uint a) public { bal[msg.sender]+=a; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function pick(uint n) public view returns(uint){ return uint(block.timestamp) % n; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { uint unlockTime; function unlock() external { require(block.timestamp>=unlockTime,"locked"); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function pay(address a) external { a.call{value:1}(""); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function pay(address a) external { (bool ok,)=a.call{value:1}(""); require(ok,"fail"); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function draw() public view returns(uint){ return uint(blockhash(block.number-1)) % 100; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { uint startBlock; function record() external { startBlock=block.number; } }
